name: plumb
description: Evidence-gated completion at the harness level — when a turn edits code and claims it works but never ran a check, plumb asks it to prove it before finishing.

arm.title: Arm the completion gate
arm.description: When on, plumb blocks a turn that edited code and claimed success without running any test, build, or run command. Off (default) is observe-only: it records what it would have blocked to a log, without ever interrupting a turn.

session_cap.title: Armed blocks per session
session_cap.description: How many turns an armed gate may block in one session before it goes quiet. Ignored while observe-only.

extra_checks.title: Extra check commands
extra_checks.description: Comma-separated command fragments that count as running a check, for test or build runners plumb doesn't recognize on its own — e.g. './scripts/verify.sh, invoke ci'. Matched anywhere in a command line, case-insensitive.
